changeSet.author: Vincent Nadoll
changeSet.sql: UPDATE events e SET e.location = (SELECT a.locality FROM m_address_event mae LEFT JOIN addresses a ON a.id = mae.address_id WHERE e.id = mae.event_id);

changeSet.author: Vincent Nadoll
Vincent Nadoll
changeSet.sql: UPDATE events SET location = (SELECT a.locality FROM m_address_event mae LEFT JOIN addresses a ON a.id = mae.address_id WHERE events.id = mae.event_id);
